full_text: I just got on the pill when I was a laughing to kind of tackle that that went on until 15 and the word and do it truces was then brought up on iron tablets, calories and so much blood, like I'd be having to change all the time and bed sheets and mattresses and no one kind of thought it was like, oh, it's just heavy pain for periods. You know, when you've had a few little settle, it just takes a few years and that went on until 15 and the word and do it truces was then brought up for four long years. I remember just thinking, I used to dread it and then I was never one of them people because I first got on the pill when I was a laughing to kind of tackle that and that then sent my body everywhere like I could never be and even now I could never track my period so you know maybe I'd be bleeding heavily for three weeks and then it would stop for a couple days and then it'd come back and then it would stop and I was so out of sync with my body which then made it really hard because then I was on the pill but my symptoms still remained and I remember people just thinking, you know, try a different pill, try different pain killers, you know, if you had a bath, when is this your fifth period like weight so you experienced it for a few years and it was just constant every excuse not to find out what was wrong with me and it made it really really hard.
